data.title: Binance will launch the first batch of delisting votes on March 21
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that it will launch the "Vote to Delist" mechanism from March 21, 2025. The community can vote to delist projects with monitoring labels. The voting period is 7 days, and the deadline is 23:59 (UTC) on March 27, 2025. Users must hold at least 0.01 BNB and log in to a verified account to participate in the voting. The voting results will be included in Binance's official review, but will not be used as the basis for the final decision.

data.title: South Korea Targets Unregistered Crypto Exchanges
data.description:
South Korea's FIU takes action against unregistered overseas cryptocurrency exchanges like BitMEX and KuCoin, with potential website blocks for exchanges serving Korean users.
source: https://coincu.com/327733-south-korea-crypto-exchange-action

data.title: BlackRock thinks Bitcoin could thrive in a recession – Will it?
data.description:
Market sentiment on Bitcoin's ability to hedge against economic pressure remains mixed.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/blackrock-thinks-bitcoin-could-thrive-in-a-recession-will-it/

data.title: South Korea Takes Action Against Unregistered Crypto Exchanges
data.description: According to Odaily, the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) under South Korea's Financial Services Commission (FSC) has initiated enforcement actions against overseas cryptocurrency exchanges that provide services to South Korean users without registration. This move is in accordance with the Act on Reporting and Using Specified Financial Transaction Information. Reports indicate that the FIU is considering blocking website access as a primary enforcement measure.

data.title: Ave.ai has fully supported PumpSwap transactions on the product side
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Ave.ai has now fully supported PumpSwap transactions on the product side, including Ave App, AveSniperBot and PC, and supports real-time synchronization of PumpSwap market K-line and full data insights.

data.title: BitMart launches Freysa (FAI)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Freysa (FAI) at 16:00 (Eastern Time) on March 21, and the FAI/USDT trading pair will be opened.
Freysa is an evolving sovereign AI agent that can be integrated with it through the Sovereign Agent Framework (SAF).

data.title: Stablecoin Market Cap Reaches $230.45 Billion, Tether Dominates
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that the current total market capitalization of stablecoins stands at $230.45 billion, marking an increase of $2.3 billion over the past week. Compared to the same period last year, the stablecoin market cap has grown by 56%. Within the overall market, Tether's USDT maintains a dominant position with a market cap of nearly $144 billion, accounting for 62.6% of the total. Following Tether, Circle's USDC holds a market cap of $59 billion.

data.title: South Korea’s financial regulator launches enforcement action against unregistered overseas crypto exchanges
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the Korea Economic Daily, the Financial Intelligence Analysis Unit (FIU) under the Financial Services Commission (FSC) of South Korea has taken enforcement actions against overseas cryptocurrency exchanges that provide services to Korean users without registration. This action is based on the Specific Financial Transaction Information Reporting and Use Act. According to reports, the FIU is considering blocking website access as the main enforcement measure.

data.title: Binance will delist AERGO, AST, BURGER and other currencies
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance decided to stop trading and delist the following currencies at 03:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025: Aergo (AERGO), AirSwap (AST), BurgerCities (BURGER), COMBO (COMBO), LinearFinance (LINA). In addition, Binance will launch a "vote to delist" function, and the currencies that have been announced to be delisted will not participate in the vote. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Polymarket's Prediction Accuracy Analyzed by Data Scientist
data.description: According to BlockBeats, research conducted by data scientist Alex McCullough reveals that prediction market Polymarket achieves a 90% accuracy rate for events predicted a month in advance, with accuracy rising to 94% within four hours of the event. McCullough's analysis of Polymarket's historical data, excluding extreme probability values, indicates that the platform tends to slightly overestimate the likelihood of events across most probability ranges. This overestimation may be influenced by factors such as herd mentality, low liquidity, and participants' preference for high-risk bets.
